name: PasswordInput
description: Password field with show/hide toggle and strength meter.

api.name: PasswordInput
api.description: Password field with show/hide toggle and strength meter.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised on every keystroke with the current input value.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown when empty. Falls back to the localized "Password.Placeholder" string when null.

parameters.name: ShowStrength
parameters.description: Shows a 4-bar strength meter and label (Weak/Fair/Good/Strong) below the field while Value is non-empty. Strength is scored from length, case mix, digits, and symbols.

parameters.name: ShowToggle
parameters.description: Shows the trailing eye icon that toggles between masked and plain-text display. Default true.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the input and the visibility-toggle button.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the input.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when invalid. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when not invalid. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Field label rendered above the input. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The input's name attribute, for form submission/identification.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the underlying password <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-input density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the field height shifts between values.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the field's outer wrapper div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the underlying <input>.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised on every keystroke with the current input value.

mdSummary:
# PasswordInput

Password field with show/hide toggle and strength meter.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/password-input

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PasswordInput | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Value | `string?` | `` | The password text. |
| PasswordInput | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Raised on every keystroke with the current input value. |
| PasswordInput | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder shown when empty. Falls back to the localized "Password.Placeholder" string when null. |
| PasswordInput | ShowStrength | `bool` | `false` | Shows a 4-bar strength meter and label (Weak/Fair/Good/Strong) below the field while Value is non-empty. Strength is scored from length, case mix, digits, and symbols. |
| PasswordInput | ShowToggle | `bool` | `true` | Shows the trailing eye icon that toggles between masked and plain-text display. Default true. |
| PasswordInput | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the input and the visibility-toggle button. |
| PasswordInput | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the input. |
| PasswordInput | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state. |
| PasswordInput | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the field when invalid. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot). |
| PasswordInput | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the field when not invalid. Only rendered when this input is standalone (outside a FormField). |
| PasswordInput | Label | `string?` | `` | Field label rendered above the input. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label. |
| PasswordInput | Name | `string?` | `` | The input's name attribute, for form submission/identification. |
| PasswordInput | AutoFocus | `bool` | `false` | Focuses the underlying password <input> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus for why the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM. |
| PasswordInput | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-input density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the field height shifts between values. |
| PasswordInput | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| PasswordInput | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the field's outer wrapper div. |
| PasswordInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the underlying <input>. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Raised on every keystroke with the current input value.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<PasswordInput />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/PasswordInput/PasswordInput.razor`
